info.name: Paneer Makhmali & Upwas Aloo Pattice Bhoj Navratri Thali
info.description: No Onion, No Garlic - Enjoy creamy Paneer Makhmali, comforting Sabudana Khichdi, crispy Upwas Aloo Pattice, cooling curd, and sweet-tangy imli chutney. (Energy: 1681KCal, Carbohydrates: 212gm, Proteins: 43gm, Fats: 71gm, Sodium: 886mg)

info.name: Paneer Makhmali & Sabudana Vada Bhoj Navratri Thali
info.description: No Onion, No Garlic - A royal Upvas thali featuring rich, velvety Paneer Makhmali, comforting Sabudana Khichdi, and perfectly crispy Sabudana Vada. Paired with cooling curd and sweet-tangy imli chutney for a wholesome, indulgent fasting feast. (Energy: 1696KCal, Carbohydrates: 215gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 72gm, Sodium: 1030mg)

info.name: Paneer Makhani Bowl.
info.description:

 Soft paneer cooked in a light, creamy gravy.

info.name: Sabudana Khichdi & Curd Meal
info.description: No Onion, No Garlic, Sendha Namak - Light yet satisfying Sabudana Khichdi made with perfectly cooked sabudana and mild spices. Served with curd for a comforting and nourishing Upvas meal. (Energy: 1052KCal, Carbohydrates: 170gm, Proteins: 21gm, Fats: 31gm, Sodium: 429mg)

info.name: Sabudana Khichdi Curd Meal with Aloo Pattice

(Energy: 1250KCal, Carbohydrates: 128gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 71gm, Sodium: 651mg)

info.name: Mushroom Masala Bowl (500 gms)
info.description: Flavorful Mushroom Masala tender mushrooms cooked in a aromatic gravy, perfect for enjoying with rice or kulchas. (Energy: 575KCal, Carbohydrates: 65gm, Proteins: 25gm, Fats: 13gm, Sodium: 1525mg)

info.name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka Masala(500 Gms)
info.description: Savour tender, char-grilled paneer chunks with this authentic tikka masala curry. A mouthwatering combination of flavour and texture, indulge in this lajawab paneer peshkash for a royal daawat! (Energy: 1028KCal, Carbohydrates: 86gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 55gm, Sodium: 1950mg)

info.name: Flavourful Steamed Rice Bowl
info.description: Lush long grain Basmati rice cooked with fried onions and home-style spices consisting of turmeric, cinnamon and cloves. (Energy: 319KCal, Carbohydrates: 26gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 20gm, Sodium: 21mg)

info.name: Kulcha Tub (2 pcs)
info.description: A north Indian speciality, Kulcha is a popular soft leavened bread that melts in your mouth (2 Kulcha). (Energy: 313KCal, Carbohydrates: 53gm, Proteins: 8gm, Fats: 7gm)

info.name: Chapati Tub (6 pcs)
info.description: 6 pcs of warm & fresh homestyle Chapatis. (Energy: 545KCal, Carbohydrates: 99gm, Proteins: 13gm, Fats: 10gm, Sodium: 997mg)

info.name: Wheat Paratha (3 pcs)
info.description: Wheat-based parathas heated to a buttery, golden-brown perfection, makes for an ideal accompaniment with curries. (Energy: 729KCal, Carbohydrates: 60gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 69gm, Sodium: 423mg)

info.name: Whole wheat Triangle paratha (6 pcs)
info.description: Delicious North Indian Parathas makes for an ideal accompaniment with curries. We make ours in the same nostalgic triangle shape (6 Parathas). (Energy: 648KCal, Carbohydrates: 120gm, Proteins: 7gm, Fats: 48gm, Sodium: 846mg)

info.name: Rumali Roti (2 Pcs)
info.description: Freshly made Rumali Rotis just the right portion to pair with your favorite dish. (Energy: 440KCal, Carbohydrates: 91gm, Proteins: 13gm, Fats: 2gm, Sodium: 854mg)

info.name: Rumali Roti (4 Pcs)
info.description: Soft, thin, and perfectly folded Rumali Rotis enjoy them with any curry or on their own. (Energy: 880KCal, Carbohydrates: 183gm, Proteins: 26gm, Fats: 4gm, Sodium: 1708mg)

info.name: Coca Cola Bottle (475 mL)
info.description: 475 mL Coca Cola Bottle. (Energy: 209KCal, Carbohydrates: 52gm, Sodium: 40mg)

info.name: Potato Chilli Shots with Mayo Dip
info.description: Crispy and spiced potato shots served with a cheesy mayonnaise dip to tantalize your tastebuds. (Energy: 370KCal, Carbohydrates: 31gm, Proteins: 2gm, Fats: 26gm, Sodium: 676mg)

info.name: Potato Wedges (Medium)
info.description: When you dont know what to eat next we suggest keep it simple and call for the wedges. (Energy: 233KCal, Carbohydrates: 28gm, Proteins: 5gm, Fats: 11gm, Sodium: 401mg)

info.name: Masala Lemonade (200 mL)
info.description: A refreshing classic drink with combined goodness of fresh lime , himalayan pink salt & infused spices. (Energy: 94KCal, Carbohydrates: 24gm)

info.name: Skimmed Mint Buttermilk
info.description: Mildly spiced Indian buttermilk with the freshness of mint. (Energy: 76KCal, Carbohydrates: 5gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 3gm, Sodium: 715mg)

info.name: Lemon Soda
info.description: Cool off with this zesty lemon soda, bursting with bright citrus flavour and lively fizz. A go-to drink for a quick and refreshing boost anytime! (Energy: 115KCal, Carbohydrates: 27gm, Sodium: 300mg)

info.name: Badam Kesar Thandai - Pack of 1
info.description: Rich, refreshing, and fasting-friendly, our Badam Kesar Thandai is the perfect upvas treat! (Energy: 198KCal, Carbohydrates: 25gm, Proteins: 9gm, Fats: 4gm, Sodium: 100mg)

info.name: Badam Kesar Thandai - Pack of 4
info.description: For you and your gang! Uplift your celebration with Holi Special Badam Kesar Thandai this festival. (Energy: 792KCal, Carbohydrates: 100gm, Proteins: 36gm, Fats: 16gm, Sodium: 400mg)

info.name: Gajar Halwa
info.description: Indulge in the comforting warmth of our aromatic Gajar Halwa, a classic Indian dessert crafted with freshly grated carrots, simmered in milk, ghee, and garnished with almonds, Perfect for one with Indian sweet cravings

info.name: Gulab Jamun
info.description: Soft, sweet and dripping with deliciousness, here's India's favourite dessert.

info.name: Death by Chocolate Cake Jar
info.description: Dont take the name literally, but our Death By Chocolate Jar is a chocolate heaven sure to transport you to another level. (Energy: 394KCal, Carbohydrates: 43gm, Proteins: 2gm, Fats: 23gm)

info.name: Rich Red Velvet Pastry
info.description: Rich and moist Red Velvet cake layered with fresh cream cheese makes our Red Velvet pastry difficult to share. Youll think twice too. (Energy: 301KCal, Carbohydrates: 50gm, Proteins: 5gm, Fats: 8gm)

info.name: Choco Chip Brownie
info.description: Get ready for a chocolate explosion! Our Choco Chip Brownie is packed with chocolate chips and a soft, gooey texture that will leave you wanting more. (Energy: 370KCal, Carbohydrates: 40gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 21gm, Sodium: 298mg)

info.name: Walnut Brownie
info.description: Our Walnut Brownie is the perfect combination of Chocolate & Crunch, featuring a dense, fudgy loaded with walnuts for a treat that's pure bliss. (Energy: 385KCal, Carbohydrates: 38gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 23gm, Sodium: 294mg)
